name: IdsEdwEvtTypDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH main AS (SELECT EVT_TYP.EVT_TYP_SK, EVT_TYP.EVT_TYP_ID, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, EVT_TYP.EVT_STAFF_TYP_SK, EVT_TYP.LAST_UPDT_DTM AS EVT_TYP_LAST_UPDT_DTM, EVT_TYP.EVT_TYP_DESC, EVT_TYP.LAST_UPDT_USER_ID AS EVT_TYP_LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, EVT_TYP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.EVT_TYP EVT_TYP LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON EVT_TYP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE EVT_TYP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IdsRunCycle} AND EVT_TYP.EVT_TYP_SK <> 0 AND EVT_TYP.SK <> 1), unk AS (SELECT 0 AS EVT_TYP_SK, 'UNK' AS EVT_TYP_ID, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_SK, '1753-01-01 00:00:00.000' AS EVT_TYP_LAST_UPDT_DTM, '' AS EVT_TYP_DESC, 'UNK' AS EVT_TYP_LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), na AS (SELECT 1 AS EVT_TYP_SK, 'NA' AS EVT_TYP_ID, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS EVT_STAFF_TYP_SK, '1753-01-01 00:00:00.000' AS EVT_TYP_LAST_UPDT_DTM, '' AS EVT_TYP_DESC, 'NA' AS EVT_TYP_LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM na

PROCESSING: Extracts all IDS records and loads in to EDW EVT_TYP_D table

Annotations:
Job name: IdsEdwEvtTypDExtr


Job Extract data from IDS table and apply Fkey and Code denormalization, create a load ready file.
Read data from source table EVT_TYP
Write EVT_TYP_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
